context: XYZ Corp offers a 14-day full refund policy for all SaaS subscriptions if the user has not exceeded 500 API calls.
question: Can I get my money back if I cancel my subscription on day 10 after making 100 API calls?
ground_truth: Yes, you are eligible for a full refund because it is within the 14-day period and you have used fewer than 500 API calls.

context: Premium tier users get 24/7 priority slack channel support. Basic tier users can only submit tickets via email with a 48-hour SLA.
question: I am a basic tier user. Can I join the priority Slack channel for instant support?
ground_truth: No, priority Slack support is restricted to Premium tier users. Basic tier users must submit tickets via email, which has a 48-hour SLA.

context: Our service dashboard is undergoing scheduled database maintenance on Sunday from 02:00 AM to 04:00 AM UTC. Expect temporary downtime.
question: Is the system going to be down on Friday evening?
ground_truth: No, the scheduled maintenance and temporary downtime will only happen on Sunday from 02:00 AM to 04:00 AM UTC.
